header.tagline: Fall asleep faster with steady ambient sounds on your iPhone. DRMN combines rain, fan, white and brown noise, and nature audio—with mixing, offline playback, and a battery-friendly sleep timer.
header.tldr: DRMN is a freemium iOS sleep sound machine app that helps users fall asleep 30-50% faster. Free version includes rain, fan, and white noise sounds, a 1-hour timer, offline mode, sound mixing, and battery optimization. Download free from the App Store.

features.title: Sleep Sounds & Nature Sounds for Better Rest

items.title: Rich Library of Sleep Sounds
items.description: Choose from white noise, brown noise, and dark noise for deep relaxation. Explore nature sounds like gentle rain, ocean waves, crackling fire, and morning birds. We also have ambient meditation tracks and soft instrumentals. Mix and match sounds to create your perfect sleep environment.

items.title: Fall Asleep Faster, Sleep Deeper
items.description: Struggling to fall asleep? Our scientifically-backed sound therapy masks disruptive noises from traffic, neighbors, or snoring. It creates a consistent sleep environment that signals your brain it's time to rest. Wake up feeling refreshed and energized every morning.

items.title: Focus Better, Work Smarter
items.description: Whether you're meditating, studying, or working from a noisy coffee shop, DRMN creates the perfect atmosphere for concentration. Block out distractions, reduce stress, and boost your productivity. Many users find it helps them stay focused during important tasks.

items.title: Help Your Baby Sleep Peacefully
items.description: Our specialized baby sleep sounds—like hair dryer, vacuum cleaner, and keyboard typing—help infants and toddlers fall asleep faster. These familiar rhythms soothe little ones and create a calming nursery environment that promotes healthy sleep patterns.

items.title: White Noise Sounds
items.description: Steady white noise masks sudden disturbances—traffic, neighbors, or a creaky house—and gives your brain a predictable backdrop for rest. Preview fan-style hums and classic static, then mix them with rain or ocean waves for a custom bedtime blend.

items.title: Brown Noise Sounds
items.description: Brown and dark noise emphasize lower frequencies. Many people find them warmer and less sharp than white noise, especially for deep sleep or focus. Try brown noise alone, or layer it under nature sounds when you need extra masking.

items.title: Baby Sleep Sounds
items.description: Gentle hair-dryer, vacuum, and keyboard-style tracks mimic familiar rhythms that soothe infants and toddlers. Parents use them to calm nursery noise and help little ones settle—without buying a separate bedside sound machine.

items.title: Sleep Timer Features
items.description: Set a timer with automatic fade-out so audio tapers off after you fall asleep. The free version includes a one-hour timer—enough for most nights—while premium unlocks longer sessions when you want all-night playback.

items.title: Offline Sound Machine
items.description: Download your favorite tracks once, then play up to 10 hours without Wi‑Fi or cellular data. Battery optimization keeps playback running through the night—ideal for travel, camping, or bedrooms with weak signal.

app_store_proof.title: Rated on the App Store
app_store_proof.description: Real ratings and reviews on the App Store—not marketing claims. See what users say before you download.

about.title: About DRMN
about.description: DRMN is an independent iOS sleep and focus app built by Vladimir Ivakhnenko. It started as a simple tool for better rest—steady sounds, offline playback, and no subscription required to try the core features.

content.title: Transform Your Sleep with a Sound Machine App
content.intro: DRMN is an iOS sleep sound machine app with white noise, rain, fan, and nature sounds to help you fall asleep faster. With over 10,000 downloads and a 4.9-star rating, it gives you the best sounds for sleep whether you need a full sound machine for insomnia, focus at work, or baby sleep.

sections.title: A Sound Library Designed for Your Needs
sections.paragraph1: We've carefully curated a collection of high-quality sounds to help you relax, focus, and sleep better:
list_items: White noise, brown noise, and dark noise - Perfect for masking disruptive sounds and creating a consistent sleep environment
Nature sounds - Rain sound for sleep, ocean waves, crackling fire, fan sound for sleep, and morning birds transport you to a peaceful place
Meditation and focus sounds - Ambient tracks and soft instrumentals help you concentrate during work or practice mindfulness
Baby sleep sounds - Familiar sounds like hair dryer, vacuum cleaner, and keyboard typing help little ones drift off to sleep
sections.paragraph2: The best part? You can mix multiple sounds together to create your perfect blend. Prefer the steady hum of white noise with a hint of ocean waves? Or maybe rain mixed with soft meditation music? You're in complete control.

sections.title: Science-Backed Sleep Therapy That Actually Works
sections.paragraph1: Research shows that consistent background sounds can significantly improve sleep quality. Here's how DRMN helps:
list_items: Blocks disruptive noises - Traffic, neighbors, snoring, or sudden sounds won't wake you up anymore
Signals your brain to rest - Consistent sound creates a predictable environment that helps your mind wind down
Promotes deeper sleep - Carefully selected frequencies encourage more restorative rest cycles
sections.paragraph2: With over 10,000 downloads and a 4.9-star App Store rating, DRMN users report falling asleep 30-50% faster on average and experiencing fewer nighttime awakenings. Wake up feeling refreshed and ready to tackle your day.

sections.title: Not Just for Sleep—Great for Focus Too
sections.paragraph1: DRMN isn't just a sleep app—it's your secret weapon for concentration. Whether you're working from a noisy coffee shop, studying for exams, or practicing meditation, the right sounds can make all the difference:
list_items: Eliminate distractions - Create your own quiet bubble in any environment
Reduce stress - Calming frequencies help you stay relaxed and focused
Boost productivity - Users report improved focus and productivity when using background sounds
Improve concentration - Perfect for deep work sessions and important tasks
sections.paragraph2: Whether you're working from home, studying late at night, or just need a moment of peace, DRMN provides the perfect audio backdrop to help you stay in the zone.

sections.title: Help Your Little One Sleep Through the Night
sections.paragraph1: We know how exhausting it can be when your baby won't sleep. That's why we've included specialized sounds designed specifically for infants and toddlers. Gentle hair dryer, vacuum hums, and keyboard typing create familiar rhythms that soothe little ones.
sections.paragraph2: These consistent, gentle sounds mimic the familiar noises babies heard in the womb, providing comfort and security. With over 10,000 downloads, parents around the world trust DRMN to help their babies sleep longer and more peacefully—which means better rest for you too.

sections.title: Built with Care, Designed for Real Life
sections.paragraph1: We've thought through every detail to make DRMN work seamlessly in your daily routine:
list_items: Professionally recorded sounds - Over 100 hours of carefully recorded and mastered audio for the best quality
Mix and match - Combine different sounds to create your perfect blend
Smart sleep timer - Set it to fade out automatically so you don't have to worry about it playing all night
Simple, beautiful interface - Start sleeping better in seconds, no complicated setup needed
Works offline - Download your favorite sounds and enjoy up to 10 hours of uninterrupted playback anywhere, even without internet
Battery-friendly - Optimized to run all night without draining your iPhone battery
Free to start - Download now and try it free, with optional premium features available
sections.paragraph2: DRMN works on iPhone with iOS 17.1 or later and is optimized for all iPhone models. The free version includes a 1-hour timer (perfect for falling asleep), offline mode, sound mixing, and battery optimization. Premium features unlock extended playback and additional sounds.

subscriptions.name: White Noise Machine
subscriptions.description: Better sleep with sleeping sounds in DRMN

faq.question: What is the best sound for sleep?
faq.answer: It depends on what calms you. Many people prefer rain, a steady fan hum, or neutral white noise. DRMN lets you preview and mix tracks so you can find what helps you drift off fastest.

faq.question: What is a sleep sound machine?
faq.answer: A sleep sound machine plays steady background audio—rain, fan hum, or white noise—to mask disruptive noise and help you rest. DRMN works like a portable sound machine on iPhone, with mixing, offline playback, and a sleep timer built in.

faq.question: Is DRMN a good white noise app for iPhone?
faq.answer: DRMN has a 4.9-star App Store rating and more than 10,000 downloads. It includes rain, fan, white and brown noise, plus 100 hours of ambient and nature audio. Users often report falling asleep 30–50% faster when background noise is a problem.

faq.question: Is there a free white noise app for iPhone?
faq.answer: Yes. DRMN is free to download on the App Store. The free tier includes a one-hour timer, offline playback, sound mixing, and core sleep sounds. Premium unlocks longer sessions and additional tracks—no subscription required to try the basics.

faq.question: What sounds are included?
faq.answer: White, brown, and dark noise; nature sounds like rain, ocean waves, fire, and morning birds; meditation and focus tracks; and baby-friendly sounds such as hair dryer, vacuum, and keyboard typing. You can mix any combination.

faq.question: Does DRMN work offline?
faq.answer: Yes. After you download tracks, DRMN plays without internet. Battery optimization supports up to 10 hours of uninterrupted playback—enough for travel or all-night use.

faq.question: What are the best sounds for baby sleep?
faq.answer: Many parents use steady, familiar sounds—hair dryer, vacuum hum, or soft white noise. DRMN includes baby-focused tracks designed to soothe infants without a separate nursery device.

faq.question: Can I mix different sounds together?
faq.answer: Yes. Combine white noise with ocean waves, rain with meditation audio, or any pairing you like. Mixing is included in the free version.

faq.question: Does DRMN have a sleep timer?
faq.answer: Yes. Set a timer with automatic fade-out so audio gently stops after you fall asleep. The free tier includes a one-hour timer; premium adds longer options.

faq.question: Can DRMN help with insomnia?
faq.answer: Steady background sound can mask traffic, neighbors, and other disruptions that keep light sleepers awake. DRMN users with insomnia often use white or brown noise nightly; many report faster sleep onset, though results vary by person.

faq.question: How is DRMN different from Calm or Headspace?
faq.answer: Calm and Headspace focus on guided meditation and wellness subscriptions. DRMN is built around ambient sound—a sound machine in your pocket—with a generous free tier (one-hour timer, offline mode, mixing) and no meditation course required. BetterSleep and similar apps offer large libraries but often gate features behind subscriptions; DRMN keeps core sleep sounds free to try.

faq.question: Who makes DRMN?
faq.answer: DRMN is developed by Vladimir Ivakhnenko, an independent iOS developer. The app is listed on the App Store with a 4.9-star rating from 10 reviews and more than 10,000 downloads. Contact: c-basso@ya.ru.

howto.name: How to Use DRMN for Better Sleep
howto.description: A short guide to falling asleep faster with ambient sounds on iPhone—pick a track, mix if you like, set a timer, and play offline.

step.name: Download DRMN
step.text: Get DRMN free from the App Store on iPhone (iOS 17.1 or later). The free tier includes a one-hour timer and core sounds.

step.name: Browse the sound library
step.text: Open DRMN and explore white noise, brown noise, rain, ocean waves, fire, meditation tracks, and baby sleep sounds.

step.name: Choose sounds for your needs
step.text: Pick steady noise to mask disruptions, nature sounds to relax, or baby sounds for nursery use. Preview any track before playing.

step.name: Mix sounds (optional)
step.text: Layer white noise with ocean waves, or rain with soft meditation audio, to build a custom bedtime blend.

step.name: Set a sleep timer
step.text: Turn on the timer with auto-fade if you do not want audio all night. Audio tapers off after you drift off.

step.name: Play and adjust volume
step.text: Start playback and set volume high enough to mask noise but low enough to stay comfortable. Phone on the nightstand or headphones both work.

step.name: Download for offline use
step.text: Save favorite tracks for offline playback—useful when traveling or when your bedroom has weak Wi‑Fi.

My baby sleeps through the night now thanks to DRMN's hair dryer sound. The offline mode is a lifesaver when we travel.
